title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Celebi India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Celebi India
jsonLd.description:
We at Celebi India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Celebi India:
Celebi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India!
